title: tecoma stans var. angustata
intro: Tecoma stans var. angustata, also known as the narrow-leaved yellow bell, is a variety of the Tecoma stans plant, which is a flowering plant species native to the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tecoma stans var. angustata include its ability to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Tecoma stans var. angustata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
